query: Vida complaints OR frustrating OR broken

results.title: ‎Vida Health - Ratings & Reviews - App Store
results.content: This is not a good app and if your insurance forces you to use it to get existing GLP-1 coverage, Godspeed to you. Also very funny if you read their terms of service they will state they are not a healthcare provider. I bet if you check their job listings you’ll see they haven’t even hired enough physicians to cover your area when you’re in the middle of your “grace period”. And, if you get frustrated in messages with the care team they will threaten to ban you. The American healthcare system is fundamentally broken and company’s like Vida are just picking everyone’s pockets. Also, the interface is garbage and you will waste a lot of your own time.I am updating my review because VIDA has feigned concern about my situation. I would just like to say to them, shutter your useless company. [...] Thank you for this detailed feedback. We hear your frustrations regarding the app navigation and meal tracking; we are constantly working to improve these features to better support our members’ daily habits.Regarding your privacy concerns, we want to be very clear: Vida is HIPAA-compliant. We do not sell your clinical data. Any third-party tracking you see is used strictly to ensure app security and stable performance. We take the protection of your data very seriously.We also understand the frustration of not seeing the progress you hoped for after a year of engagement. Weight loss is a complex journey, and we encourage you to discuss these results with your Vida providers, who can help look at the different factors in your health story to find the best path forward. If you need [...] We truly appreciate you sharing your experience, though we are sorry to hear of your frustration regarding medication access. At Vida, we aim for clinical excellence by providing comprehensive, expert-led care.Regarding prescriptions, our clinicians work closely with insurance formularies to find the most accessible and affordable options for our members. These paths often require specific clinical milestones to ensure long-term safety and success. However, we take your feedback about provider communication very seriously, as we strive for a seamless and integrated experience across our care teams.We would like to review your specific case and ensure your concerns are heard. Please reach out to us at support@vida.com so we can investigate your experience with our providers and better

results.title: Vida LLC | BBB Complaints | Better Business Bureau
results.content:
Resolved:The complainant verified the issue was resolved to their satisfaction. Unresolved:The business responded to the dispute but failed to make a good faith effort to resolve it. Answered:The business addressed the issues within the complaint, but the consumer either a) did not accept the response, OR b) did not notify BBB as to their satisfaction. Unanswered:The business failed to respond to the dispute. Unpursuable:BBB is unable to locate the business.    I initially engaged with REMOVED in late September. He recommended the 100 hour package for $3195. He described Vida as using a multi factor approach and said they would be conducting a pro active search, managing my dating platforms, selecting the best photos for my profiles and re writing my dating profiles. He said this would [...] VIDA Select is a legitimate matchmaking service with an excellent reputation, evidenced by our 4.7/5 star rating on Trustpilot from over 370 reviews. While we strive for 100% client satisfaction, the nature of dating services involves many complex and personal factors. Individual preferences, life circumstances, and the unpredictable nature of human connections all play significant roles in the matchmaking process. We recognize the emotional investment our clients make and continually work to set clear expectations and provide support throughout our service. Our high overall ratings reflect our commitment to delivering value. [...] VIDA Select remains committed to helping our clients find meaningful relationships and continuously improving our services based on client feedback.  #### Customer Answer

Date:08/08/2024

Better Business Bureau:

I have reviewed the response made by the business in reference to my complaint and have determined that this does not resolve my issue.For your reference, details of the offer I reviewed appear below.

REMOVED In order for the bureau to continue to assist you, you MUST provide your view on the matteror your complaint will be closed as answered.Regards,

results.title: No 408 And Now You Can Go by Vendela Vida Book 18 of #20booksofsummer21
results.content:
Despite these strengths, And Now You Can Go was a frustrating reading experience, with an uneven tone and arbitrary plot. Having said that, I would read more by Vida, as her prose has an easy readability but this debut was trying a bit too hard for my liking.

I swapped The Best of Everything by Rona Jaffe for And Now You Can Go so am counting this as book 18 of 20 Books of Summer.

I am a 40 something book buying addict trying to reduce the backlog one book at a time!

### 15 Comments Leave a comment ›

1. This sounds like a book written by a 21 year old, never mind about one! Your sense of frustration comes across, Cathy, and how disappointing that it contains crass and lazy stereotyping. I’d not heard of her, so I’ve looked her up and done some crass and lazy stereotyping of my own about her – she sounds like a US version of Zadie Smith to me!

   LikeLike

    To be honest Jan, I think she was quite young when she wrote this. I’m probably overly sensitive about the Irish references, but they were off-putting.

     LikeLiked by 1 person [...] Skip to content   putting her head in the oven, a suitor shows his love by sticking coloured drawing pins into his face while drunk. Pens come in the shape of toothpaste tubes, vases of flowers are replaced by vases of antique pipes and my goodwill was pushed to the limit by some very lazy and painfully crass stereotypes about the Irish.

Having said all that, there are some moments of real inspiration in And Now You Can Go. Vida perfectly captures the random and often very personal reactions that victims have to a traumatic assault and can at times write with an unremitting honesty.

> “I think about making a break for it, about running so fast I can’t even look down for fear of stumbling. But I imagine myself being shot in the back. Paralysed. No, I decide, rape is better”

results.title: Vida Lifestyle Customer Service Phone Number 1-855-411-3969, Email, Help Center
results.content:
### 

Vida Lifestyle email is support@vidalifestyle.com. The customer care department operates this email address. You can send the letter with a detailed description of your problem to receive a formal written response in a few days. To reach the legal department, send the request to legal@arrivia.com. The opt-out of marketing is accessible via optout@ourvacationcenter.com.   
To reach the headquarters specialists, send the letter to the Vida Lifestyle address of the corporate office - 7720 N. Dobson Rd.Scottsdale, Arizona 85256 United States. Employees of the company will consider it in a few days and turn to you with answers.

### Activation/ Cancellation Question: [...] PissedConsumer does not publish unverified contact information. We mainly rely on official company websites and their verified social media pages. They are regarded as authoritative sources. Our team cross-checks every update and conducts thorough risk screening. Whenever possible, we use contact details that companies or their official representatives give us. If so, everything stays current. If customers or businesses report incorrect contact information, we start a validation process and cross-reference the details with trusted third-party sources.
